description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage that runs on a Windows SaaS runner (tag saas-windows-medium-amd64). Add a job named build-test-windows in the build stage that runs in parallel for PYTHON_VERSION values 310, 311, 312 and 313, and is triggered only on the master branch, any branch matching ^windows.* or on tags matching a semantic version pattern. The job defines variables BUNDLEDLLS=1, OPENSSL_INSTALLER=Win64OpenSSL-3_0_18.exe and OPENSSL_PATH=C:\OpenSSL-3-0-Win64, then executes the exact PowerShell commands: set $CHOCOLATEY_PYTHON_OPTIONS=""; choco install --limitoutput --yes $CHOCOLATEY_PYTHON_OPTIONS python$PYTHON_VERSION; choco install --limitoutput --yes swig; Import-Module $env:ChocolateyInstall\helpers\chocolateyProfile.psm1; refreshenv; echo "Python version and architecture:"; python --version; python -c 'import struct; print(struct.calcsize(''P'') * 8)'; echo "Install OpenSSL"; curl.exe -o "c:\$OPENSSL_INSTALLER" -w '%{url}\n' -fL "https://slproweb.com/download/$OPENSSL_INSTALLER"; Start-Process -FilePath "c:\$OPENSSL_INSTALLER" -ArgumentList "/silent /verysilent /DIR=$OPENSSL_PATH" -NoNewWindow -Wait; $ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"; if (-not (Test-Path "$OPENSSL_PATH\bin\openssl.exe")) { throw "OpenSSL installation failed" }; echo "Install pywin32"; python -m pip install pywin32; $env:PATH = "$OPENSSL_PATH\bin;$env:PATH"; ls "$OPENSSL_PATH"; ls -Recurse "$OPENSSL_PATH"; echo "Installed SDKs:"; if (Test-Path "C:/Program Files/Microsoft SDKs/Windows") { ls "C:/Program Files/Microsoft SDKs/Windows" }; echo "Installed OpenSSL version:"; Start-Process -FilePath "$OPENSSL_PATH\bin\openssl.exe" -ArgumentList "version" -Wait -NoNewWindow; echo "Python OpenSSL version:"; python -c 'import ssl; print(getattr(ssl, ''OPENSSL_VERSION'', None))'; echo "Install dev dependencies"; python -m pip install -r dev-requirements.txt; echo "BUNDLEDLLS is set to $env:BUNDLEDLLS"; python -m pip wheel --verbose --no-build-isolation --no-deps --wheel-dir .\dist .; ls ".\dist"; $env:PYTHONPATH_DIR = "win-amd64-cpython-$PYTHON_VERSION"; python -m pip install -v --upgrade --target build/lib.$PYTHONPATH_DIR --no-compile --ignore-installed --no-deps --no-index --find-links dist m2crypto; $env:PYTHONPATH = "build/lib.$PYTHONPATH_DIR"; python -m unittest discover -b -v tests. The job stores the built wheels in dist/* and the generated SWIG wrapper src/SWIG/_m2crypto_wrap.c as artifacts.
